title: Post-Quantum Cryptography and Hybrid Migration · Runtime Contract: Crypto Go Hybrid Pq Migration

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Predict Crypto Go Hybrid Pq Migration · Theory Crypto Go Hybrid Pq Migration
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory cryptographic engineering team handles case 4120 during a credential migration window. Build deterministic Go evidence to gate hybrid ML-KEM and ML-DSA migration on inventory, specified combiner, transcript binding, downgrade defense, and rollback; cap bytes, work, memory, time, attempts, concurrency, and retained secret material before use; then repeat or roll back a nonce, sequence, or key version and reject the stale state. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.
